title: SUPERSUN 8 Citronella Candles Outdoor: 80-120 Hours Garden Citronella Candles Set, Soy Wax Scented Candles for Outdoor, Indoor, Camping, Outside, Garden
features: Effective: SUPERSUN 8 pieces citronella oil candles set can effectively drive away garden annoying sounds.
Long burn: Each citronella candle outdoor can burn for 10-15 hours, total burning time is up to 80-120 hours.
Pure: Our citronella candles with lightweight buckets are made from 100% soy candle wax, along with organic candle wick.

Summer gift: The garden citronella candles effectively avoid summer annoying sounds when you having outdoor activities, eg. camping, BBQ, dinner outside house. They also brings a quite indoor evironment, eg. making food in kitchen, sleeping.
Pleasant fragrance: These scented citronella candles blended with 5% essential citronella oil diffuse a top note of green citrus and a base note of lemongrass, fresh but never overpowering.
description: Product Description Specification Burn time: 10-15 hours each (80-120 hours in total) Material: Soy candle wax, 5% citronella oil Scent: Top note: green citrus; Base note: lemon Dimension: 2.24*1.77*1.45 inch Weight: 75g each (600g in total) For Outdoor For Indoor
